infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MathSnap uses the camera to scan and solve math expressions instantly.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MathSnap accesses your photo library so you can solve math from existing photos.

plugins.cameraPermission: MathSnap uses the camera to scan math expressions and solve them instantly.

plugins.photosPermission: MathSnap accesses your photos to solve math expressions from images.
Allow MathSnap to save solved math results to your gallery.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow MathSnap to save results to your gallery.
